name: Integer Properties
description: Factors, multiples, primes, even/odd rules, divisibility, LCM and GCD.

name: Number Line & Ordering
description: Comparing and ordering numbers, including negatives and fractions, on a number line.

name: Order of Operations
description: Evaluating arithmetic expressions using PEMDAS with signed numbers.

name: Absolute Value
description: Definition and evaluation of absolute value, distance interpretation on the number line.

name: Estimation & Rounding
description: Rounding numbers and estimating results to check reasonableness or save time.

name: Fraction Operations
description: Adding, subtracting, multiplying, dividing, and simplifying fractions.

name: Decimal Operations
description: Arithmetic with decimals, including place value and conversion to/from fractions.

name: Percent Basics
description: Converting between percents, fractions, and decimals; computing a percent of a quantity.

name: Percent Increase/Decrease
description: Percent increase and decrease, successive percent changes, and reverse-percent problems.

name: Ratios & Proportions
description: Setting up and solving ratio and proportion problems, including part-to-whole relationships.

name: Rates, Distance/Time & Work
description: Rate problems including distance/rate/time and combined work-rate problems.

name: Laws of Exponents
description: Rules for multiplying, dividing, and raising powers, including zero and negative exponents.

name: Roots & Radicals
description: Simplifying square and cube roots and operations with radical expressions.

name: Simplifying Expressions
description: Combining like terms and simplifying algebraic expressions using the distributive property.

name: Linear Equations, One Variable
description: Solving linear equations in a single variable.

name: Systems of Linear Equations
description: Solving systems of two linear equations by substitution and elimination.

name: Linear Inequalities
description: Solving and graphing linear inequalities, including sign flips when multiplying/dividing by negatives.

name: Compound Inequalities
description: Solving compound (and/or) inequalities and expressing solution sets.

name: Absolute Value Equations/Inequalities
description: Solving equations and inequalities that involve absolute value expressions.

name: Factoring Polynomials
description: Factoring common factor, difference of squares, and trinomial expressions.

name: Quadratic Equations
description: Solving quadratic equations by factoring, the quadratic formula, and interpreting roots.

name: Functions & f(x) Notation
description: Evaluating and interpreting functions given in f(x) notation, including piecewise/defined operations.

name: Translating Word Problems
description: Translating verbal descriptions into algebraic equations and solving them.

name: Arithmetic & Geometric Sequences
description: Finding terms and sums of arithmetic and geometric sequences.

name: Lines & Angles
description: Angle relationships formed by intersecting lines, parallel lines, and transversals.

name: Triangle Basics
description: Angle sum, exterior angle theorem, and classification of triangles.

name: Triangle Inequality
description: The triangle inequality theorem and its use in bounding unknown side lengths.

name: Right Triangles & Pythagorean Theorem
description: The Pythagorean theorem, common integer triples, and their application to right triangles.

name: 30-60-90 & 45-45-90 Triangles
description: Side-length ratios in 30-60-90 and 45-45-90 right triangles.

name: Similar Triangles
description: Identifying similar triangles and using proportional side ratios to find unknowns.

name: Quadrilaterals
description: Properties, perimeter, and area of parallelograms, rectangles, squares, and trapezoids.

name: General Polygons
description: Interior/exterior angle sums and properties of regular polygons.

name: Circle Basics
description: Radius, diameter, circumference, and area of circles.

name: Arcs & Sectors
description: Arc length, sector area, and central/inscribed angle relationships.

name: 3D Solids: Volume & Surface Area
description: Volume and surface area of rectangular solids, cylinders, and other common solids.

name: Coordinate Plane, Distance & Midpoint
description: Plotting points and computing distance and midpoint in the coordinate plane.

name: Slope & Equations of Lines
description: Computing slope and writing/interpreting equations of lines in the coordinate plane.

name: Mean, Median & Mode
description: Computing and comparing mean, median, and mode of a data set.

name: Range & Standard Deviation
description: Measures of spread: range and an intuitive/computational treatment of standard deviation.

name: Weighted Averages
description: Computing averages where groups contribute unequally to the overall mean.

name: Normal Distribution Basics
description: Basic properties of the normal distribution and the 68-95-99.7 rule.

name: Permutations
description: Counting ordered arrangements using the fundamental counting principle and factorials.

name: Combinations
description: Counting unordered selections and distinguishing combinations from permutations.

name: Basic Probability
description: Computing probability of simple and combined events using counting techniques.

name: Compound & Conditional Probability
description: Independent/dependent events, mutually exclusive events, and conditional probability.

name: Reading Tables & Graphs
description: Extracting and computing values from tables, bar/line graphs, and pie charts.

name: Venn Diagrams & Sets
description: Set operations and using Venn diagrams to solve overlapping-group problems.

name: Mixed GRE-Style Practice: Arithmetic
description: A standalone pool of full-length, GRE-mock-style Arithmetic problems mixing multiple sub-skills, with randomized numbers on every attempt.

name: Mixed GRE-Style Practice: Algebra
description: A standalone pool of full-length, GRE-mock-style Algebra problems mixing multiple sub-skills, with randomized numbers on every attempt.

name: Mixed GRE-Style Practice: Geometry
description: A standalone pool of full-length, GRE-mock-style Geometry problems mixing multiple sub-skills, with randomized numbers on every attempt.

name: Mixed GRE-Style Practice: Data Analysis
description: A standalone pool of full-length, GRE-mock-style Data Analysis problems mixing multiple sub-skills, with randomized numbers on every attempt.
